---
name: Feature Request
about: New query syntax, endpoint, scoring rule, data source, or UI improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature — new syntax, endpoint, UI change, etc.

**Scryfall equivalent** (if applicable)
Does Scryfall support this? Link an example search or docs page, or write "N/A / extends Scryfall".

**Motivation**
What problem does this solve or what use case does it unlock?

**Rough approach** (optional)
If you have a sense of where in the codebase this would live or how it might work, note it here.
